data.title: Asheville, NC named nicest place in America for 2025 by Reader's Digest for its kindness and community spirit.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on Sept. 26, 2025, Reader's Digest revealed Asheville, North Carolina as the recipient of the prestigious title of the Nicest Place in America for 2025. The accolade is a result of a rigorous national quest to identify locations characterized by their kindness, sense of community, and admiration for others. Asheville stood out among the rest due to its exceptional display of these qualities. This recognition highlights the city's commitment to fostering an atmosphere of warmth and inclusion.

data.title: US economy grew by 3.8% in Q2, strongest since 2023, while Fed faces inflation pressures despite rate cut.
data.description: The U.S. economy experienced robust growth in the second quarter, with a final GDP growth rate of 3.8%, marking its strongest performance since the third quarter of 2023 and surpassing the long-term average pace. This substantial growth came after a 0.5% contraction in the first quarter, partly due to concerns regarding impending tariffs. Despite the positive GDP growth, concerns were raised over the softer labor market data observed during the summer. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell addressed this, stating that signs of labor market weakness influenced the recent decision to cut rates. Powell also mentioned that the impact of tariffs on inflation has been relatively low and temporary. He emphasized the Fed's flexibility in making future rate decisions, highlighting the challenge of balancing inflation concerns.

data.title: HMH named finalist in two categories at 2025 CODiE Awards for its connected solutions.
data.description: A company specializing in adaptive learning, HMH, is gaining recognition for its connected solutions as it emerges as a finalist in two categories at the 2025 CODiE Awards. The HMH Performance Suite has been nominated for "Best Suite of Integrated/Connected" solutions. The announcement was made in Boston on September 26, 2025. This recognition underscores the company's expertise in providing innovative educational tools. This news signifies the importance of HMH's contributions in the industry and highlights the success of their Performance Suite.

data.title: APFC's 2025 Annual Report "49 Forward" celebrates record high fiscal year-end value with Alaskans benefiting dividends.
data.description: The Alaska Permanent Fund Corporation (APFC) unveiled its 2025 Annual Report titled “49 Forward” with the Fund achieving its highest fiscal year-end value ever. The success is credited to the careful management by APFC staff and Trustees. Board Chair Jason Brune highlighted the accomplishment, stating that dividends reached Alaskans’ bank accounts. The report signifies Alaskans’ commitment to securing long-term value, reflecting foresight and dedication. The APFC's annual report showcases a record-breaking financial year, emphasizing the significance of sustainable growth and benefit for future generations.

data.title: Bitcoin options worth $18 billion to expire today, expected to cause market volatility as weekend approaches, analysts say.
data.description: Analysts are anticipating heightened volatility in the crypto markets as a result of today's record-breaking $18 billion Bitcoin options expiry. The substantial amount at stake suggests that significant price movements could occur over the weekend.

data.title: Bitfinex now supports USDT0 on Plasma Network for smooth cross-chain stablecoin transactions, enhancing user experience.
data.description: Bitfinex has revealed its backing for USDT0 on the Plasma network, which facilitates effortless transactions of the cross-chain stablecoin without any hindrances. This move underscores Bitfinex's commitment to enabling smooth deposits and withdrawals for its users within the network.

data.title: Concentrix Corp. (NASDAQ: CNXC) shares drop after Q3 earnings miss and reduced guidance. Quarterly revenue: $2.48 billion. EPS: $2.78 vs est. $2.86.
data.description: Shares of Concentrix Corporation (NASDAQ: CNXC) have dropped following the release of their third-quarter financial results. The company reported an adjusted EPS of $2.78, falling short of the expected $2.86 per share. Despite this miss, their quarterly revenue stood at $2.48 billion, surpassing the estimated $2.45 billion. As a result, Concentrix revised its fiscal 2025 adjusted EPS guidance below expectations. This adjustment has caused uncertainty among investors, leading to a decline in the stock price. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Info-Tech Research Group ranks top Data Loss Prevention solutions for 2025, based on user feedback, to reduce breach risks.
data.description: In a recent Data Loss Prevention Data Quadrant Report by the Info-Tech Research Group, the top solutions for safeguarding sensitive data and minimizing breach risks are emphasized. This report is structured on user input acquired through the SoftwareReviews platform, reflecting key insights on cybersecurity solutions.

data.title: Dow surges 375 points after Fed inflation data; small caps climb post 3-day drop. Software name plunges.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant increase of 375 points following the release of inflation data by the Federal Reserve. Small caps also saw a resurgence after a three-day period of decline. Overall, the stock market displayed positive momentum with the Dow surging, emphasizing investor optimism. This surge was notably contrasted by a software company experiencing a plunge in its stock value.

data.title: Verkada honors 2025 Safety Champions: Christina Isetta, John Mitchell, Didar Hayytov at VerkadaOne conference.
data.description: Verkada, a prominent company in AI-driven physical security technology, has recently honored three individuals for their contributions in their respective organizations. Christina Isetta from United Cerebral Palsy of the North Bay, John Mitchell from YMCA of Austin, and Didar Hayytov from Triad Math and Science Academy were recognized in 2025 by Verkada.

data.title: UBGC CEO Michael Baker steps down after 11 years; COO Christianne Rojo appointed as Interim President. Search for new CEO underway.
data.description: In Santa Barbara, California, United Boys & Girls Clubs of Santa Barbara County (UBGC) shared that CEO Michael Baker will be resigning after 11 years. To maintain continuity, Christianne Rojo, the current COO, will serve as Interim President. The Board of Directors has started the search for the next CEO.

data.title: Treasure Global appoints Michael Chan as Executive Director to boost board and drive growth.(NASDAQ: TGL) Sept 26, 2025.
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia on September 26, 2025, Treasure Global Inc. (NASDAQ: TGL), a prominent technology firm based in Southeast Asia, revealed the addition of Michael Chan to its Board of Directors as an Executive Director. The appointment is effective immediately.
